name: PAY_FLOW_INSTANCES
description: Its an Instance table to capture Flow Instances

columns.Name: FLOW_INSTANCE_ID
columns.Comments: This column is the primary key of the table pay_flow_instances.

columns.Name: FLOW_CATEGORIES
columns.Comments: This column contains the flow category value of the flow instance.

columns.Name: CONTEXT_PARAM_VALUES
columns.Comments: This column contains the context param values of the flow instance.

columns.Name: SUBMISSION_CONTEXT
columns.Comments: This column contains the submission context value of the flow instance.

columns.Name: ROOT_FLOW_INSTANCE_ID
columns.Comments: This column contains the root flow instance id of the flow instance.

columns.Name: INSTANCE_NAME
columns.Comments: This column contains the instance name of the flow instance.

columns.Name: LEGISLATIVE_DATA_GROUP_ID
columns.Comments: This column contains the ldg id of the flow instance.

columns.Name: LEGISLATION_CODE
columns.Comments: This column contains the value of legislation code which is foreign key to FND_TERRITORIES.

columns.Name: BASE_FLOW_ID
columns.Comments: This column contains the base flow id of the flow instance.

columns.Name: FI_TASK_STATUS
columns.Comments: This column contains the flow instance task status.

columns.Name: FI_PAYROLL_ID
columns.Comments: This column contains the flow instance payroll id.

columns.Name: FI_PAYROLL_PERIOD
columns.Comments: This column contains the flow instance payroll period.

columns.Name: FI_PROCESS_DATE
columns.Comments: This column contains the flow instance process date.

columns.Name: FI_TASK_TYPE
columns.Comments: This column contains the flow instance task type.

columns.Name: ERRORED
columns.Comments: This column contains the errored flag value of the flow.

columns.Name: MARKED_FOR_RETRY
columns.Comments: This column contains the marked for retry value of the flow instance.

columns.Name: REVERSED
columns.Comments: This column contains the reversed value of the flow instance.

columns.Name: NUMBER_OF_TASKS
columns.Comments: This column contains the number of tasks value in the flow instance.

columns.Name: FI_COMPLETED_TASKS
columns.Comments: This column contains the number of completed task in the flow instance.

columns.Name: RECUR_SCH_FORMULA_ID
columns.Comments: Formula to calculate a recurring schedule for flow instance

columns.Name: RECUR_TIME_COMPONENT
columns.Comments: This column contains the recur time component value in the flow instance.

columns.Name: PROGRESS
columns.Comments: This column contains the number of progress task in the flow instance.

columns.Name: ENTERPRISE_ID
columns.Comments: This column contains the value of enterprise id which is foreign key to PER_ENTERPRISES.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: RUN_ID
columns.Comments: This column contains the run id of the flow instance.

columns.Name: STATUS
columns.Comments: This column contains the status of the flow instance.

columns.Name: RECUR_SCH_TIME_DEF_ID
columns.Comments: TIME_DEFINITION_ID: Column used to capture TimeDefinitionId that will define the recurring schedule.

columns.Name: SCHEDULED_DATE
columns.Comments: Column capturing the scheduled execution date for the flow instance.

columns.Name: SCHEDULE_END_DATE
columns.Comments: Timestamp capturing end of the recurring schedule.

columns.Name: RECURRING_FLAG
columns.Comments: Flag indicating if the flow instance need to be submitted recurringly

columns.Name: FI_TASK_FLOW_FLAG
columns.Comments: Flag indicating whether the tasks belongs to a composite flow or not.

columns.Name: ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY
columns.Comments: Descriptive Flexfield: structure definition of the user descriptive flexfield.

columns.Name: ATTRIBUTE1
columns.Comments: Descriptive Flexfield: segment of the user descriptive flexfield.

columns.Name: ATTRIBUTE2
columns.Comments: Descriptive Flexfield: segment of the user descriptive flexfield.

columns.Name: ATTRIBUTE3
columns.Comments: Descriptive Flexfield: segment of the user descriptive flexfield.

columns.Name: ATTRIBUTE4
columns.Comments: Descriptive Flexfield: segment of the user descriptive flexfield.

columns.Name: ATTRIBUTE5
columns.Comments: Descriptive Flexfield: segment of the user descriptive flexfield.

columns.Name: ATTRIBUTE6
columns.Comments: Descriptive Flexfield: segment of the user descriptive flexfield.

columns.Name: ATTRIBUTE7
columns.Comments: Descriptive Flexfield: segment of the user descriptive flexfield.

columns.Name: ATTRIBUTE8
columns.Comments: Descriptive Flexfield: segment of the user descriptive flexfield.

columns.Name: ATTRIBUTE9
columns.Comments: Descriptive Flexfield: segment of the user descriptive flexfield.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: INSTANTIATED_BY
columns.Comments: This column contains the instantiated by value of the flow instance.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: EXECUTION_MODE
columns.Comments: This column contains the execution mode value of the flow.

columns.Name: FI_TOTAL_COMPLETED
columns.Comments: This column contains the number of total completed flow instance.

columns.Name: FI_ROLLEDBACK
columns.Comments: This column contains the rolledback value of flow instance.

columns.Name: FLOW_INSTANCE_NAME_UNIQUE
columns.Comments: This column contains the name unique value of flow instance.

columns.Name: FLOW_INSTANCE_UNIQUE
columns.Comments: This column contains the unique value of flow instance.

columns.Name: IS_FULL_ROLLBACK
columns.Comments: This column contains the is full rollback value of flow instance.

columns.Name: IS_SKIPPED
columns.Comments: This column contains the is skipped value of flow instance.

columns.Name: IS_INCOMPLETE
columns.Comments: This column contains the is incomplete value of flow instance.

columns.Name: IS_EXTRACT
columns.Comments: This column contains the is extract value of flow instance.

columns.Name: IS_DATA_LOADER
columns.Comments: This column contains the is data loader value of flow instance.

columns.Name: FLOW_ID
columns.Comments: This column contains the flow id value of flow instance.

columns.Name: SUB_STATUS
columns.Comments: This column contains the sub status value of flow instance.

columns.Name: AC_TYPE
columns.Comments: This column contains the ac type value of flow instance.

columns.Name: OUTBOUND_ENABLED_FLAG
columns.Comments: This column contains the outbound enabled flag value of flow instance.

columns.Name: IS_BG_PROCESSING_ACTIVE
columns.Comments: This column contains the is bg processing active value of flow instance.

columns.Name: BG_PROCESSING_STATUS
columns.Comments: This column contains the bg processing status value of flow instance.

columns.Name: IS_VERIFY_PENDING
columns.Comments: This column contains the is verify pending value of flow instance.
